honest_issues: Post-repair Follow FPS remains unmeasured; Track H must confirm the >=80% ratio and paused non-regression.

Profiling against the real Wolverine world measured Follow pose lookup at 5.143 us/call versus Court at 10.318 us/call, ruling lookup out as dominant. Follow instead caused 32 versus 6 overlapping transition restarts and 128 versus 24 vector allocations across 50 UI ticks. This was workload instrumentation, not a browser flame chart.
The sandbox denied localhost binding with EPERM, so the real VM manifest and video readyState could not be browser-verified here.
The wrapping honesty dock needs manager visual confirmation at 1600x1000.
Build retains the existing large-chunk warning. The unrelated untracked web/replay/public tree was untouched.
BEST-STACK DELTA: none; viewer-only change with no model or policy modification.
next: Track H should rerun the n=3 Court/Follow FPS harness, open the exact VM-written manifest URL, verify the loud recovery count and video readiness, and capture the degraded lower-right pane.
